hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams document and preserve audit-ready evidence for transaction screening decisions by linking wallet risk, blockchain analytics, and case workflows in one platform.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit trail becomes unclear across transactions
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to preserve a complete, traceable record of transaction screening decisions when provider outputs remain unconnected. This slows review workflows and weakens the defensibility of risk assessments and case evidence.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates wallet and transaction risk data, provider outputs, reviewer actions and decision logs into a unified workflow that preserves audit-ready evidence for transaction screening compliance.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY captures wallet risk signals and transaction alerts then routes them into structured case reviews, preserving audit evidence for compliance decisions and reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects wallet and transaction risk outputs into structured cases, decisions and evidence, providing compliance teams with clear audit trails for transaction screening workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs preserving structured audit evidence, provider orchestration and enterprise deployment controls to meet rigorous transaction screening and bank due diligence standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for transaction screening teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects wallet risk, transaction monitoring, alerts and provider outputs into structured workflows and audit-ready evidence for transaction screening teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle transaction screening workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes screening alerts, wallet and transaction risks into connected review workflows, linking them to customers and cases for consistent monitoring and decision-making across sources and jurisdictions.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence for transactions?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit logs, decision records and case histories that document which rules applied, what data was reviewed, and what actions were taken on transactions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with our existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYT and screening providers, connecting their outputs into one platform without replacing them, maintaining seamless integration with your current compliance stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT or screening providers but aggregates their outputs into structured workflows, cases, evidence and reports to reduce manual work and improve auditability.
final_title: Preserve audit-ready evidence for transaction screening
final_description: Review how SFTY connects wallet risk, blockchain analytics and case workflows into structured audit evidence for VASP compliance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
